event: increased protein level in cerebrospinal fluid
bilateral occipital, parietal and subcortical white matter T2/FLAIR hyperintensities
CECT abdomen showing a 33 × 23 × 34 mm3 irregularly marginated, locally infiltrative retroperitoneal mass
PET scan showing no evidence of metastasis
biopsy confirming the diagnosis of neuroendocrine tumor, i.e. extra-adrenal paraganglioma
